## Type of change

- [ ] 🐞 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New component
- [ ] 💡 Enhancement to an existing component
- [ ] 📖 Documentation / tooling
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor

## Checklist

- [ ] Prettier, ESLint and unit tests pass locally (`npm run prettier`, `npm run lint`, `npm run test:unit`).
- [ ] Unit tests were added or updated, including an accessibility check where applicable.
- [ ] Commits follow the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) style.
- [ ] For a new component: it ships a `README.md`, an icon, a screenshot, tests, a category in `scripts/docs/site.config.json`, and a row in the root `README.md`.
- [ ] Documentation was updated where needed.
